text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after running into Matikanefukukitaru...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Heya! Can I borrow a minute of your time?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I was thinking about starting my training for tryouts today—like, real training!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was revealed to me through my horoscope that doing well at the
upcoming tryouts is paramount to my success.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means that I'll be needing your guidance! That's okay with you,
right?!
choice_data_list: But I'm not even your trainer yet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A TV psychic said to "lend your ear to the experts." And you're an
expert trainer, right?! So you gotta train me—you just gotta!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru won't take no for an answer, so I finally give in to
her request to do some training with her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Are you serious?! My training is running in a scrimmage?!
choice_data_list: You said you wanted "real training," right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I mean, yeah... I did, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking that the best way to improve is to gain as much experience
as possible, as quickly as possible, I've already organized a
scrimmage for her.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy there! May the better runner win the race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I'm going against Taiki?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer here came to me to ask if I could lend a hand! It's the
least I can do as your friend!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But you're practically good enough to make your debut! Trainer, I
can't race against her!
choice_data_list: What happened to listening to the experts?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! Ya got me there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Could I at least try reading my fortune first?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eko, eko, azure seal! Eko, eko, wall o' rust! Goddess of victory, heed
my call!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She chants some kind of mysterious incantation, pulls a pencil out of
thin air and rolls it on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Great fortunes await me at the end of this race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's decided! I will run in this scrimmage! Witness me fly faster than I've ever flown before!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ya ready, Taiki?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I'm locked and loaded! Let's have a little fun, why don't
we?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins the scrimmage between Matikanefukukitaru and Taiki
Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wow... Taiki really is something. I'd better pick up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose though! After all, fortune stands by my side today!
Forward—to a glorious future of luck aplenty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I lost?! But how?!
choice_data_list: I guess you ran out of luck.
I guess you ran out of luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hrnnng... That's not it at all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to funnel this frustration into motivation! That's what my great
fortune is—I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I need to book it! The next race isn't gonna win itself!
Uwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, are we done already?! But I wanted to run with ya some more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, right as I'm leaving the academy campus, I hear a strange
voice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woiya... Haiya... Reveal tonight's lucky track to mine eye!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want to go running, but I first need to figure out the best track
to run on! Nothing a little bit of divination can't solve!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki would be displeased if I ever attempted to rely on
luck alone! Good fortune blesses those who work for it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Shiraoki is this amazing goddess who appears in my dreams! She tells
me what's lucky and leads me along a path of great fortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I'm ever feeling lost, down, or anxious, she cheers me up—makes
me feel better! She even helped me during my scrimmage with Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The reason why I'm even here right now is all thanks to the great
Shiraoki! I chose to believe in her, and that brought me to where I am
today...
choice_data_list: A benevolent and irreplaceable goddess, huh?
A benevolent and irreplaceable goddess, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Spot on! Now you're getting it! She's amazing, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I need to get back to training! I'm off to the lucky track!
Super Fortune Daaaash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! Why is there a puddle here?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These divinations seem to serve as some kind of motivation for her to
fulfill her own desire to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is definitely an Umamusume of many quirks, but I
feel like I'm beginning to see who she really is behind her shell of
fortune.
